chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 01 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.198/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.200/2024 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.199/2024 (R/Surety) 06.03.2024 Mr. Abdul Rauf Abro, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by applicant Muhammad Younis seeking return of surety. As per arguments of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Gul Hassan, Basit alias Abdul Basit and Khuda Bux, who, on 03.01.2024, were granted protective bail for a period of five days subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each, for which applicant stood surety by depositing two original Special Savings Certificates of such amount, have surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated time and obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from the true copy of trial Court’s order dated 06.01.2024, annexed with this application. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in some other matters, after waiving notice, has extended his no objection for granting this application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
